case_title: L LUCAS VS. COM ED et al

docket_entries.description: LETTER FROM EXELON REQUESTING A DISMISSAL.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUCAS, L AS TO DEFENDANT COM ED AN EXELON COMPANY TORRES CREDIT SERVICES
CORRESPONDENCE RE:REQUEST OF TORRES CREDIT SERVICES, INC. TO DISMISS CLAIM & ORDER RECEIVED AND FILED BY DEFENDANT TORRES CREDIT SERVICES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LUCAS, L AS TO DEFENDANT COM ED AN EXELON COMPANY TORRES CREDIT SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE RE:REQUEST OF TORRES CREDIT SERVICES, INC. TO DISMISS CLAIM & ORDER- CHALLENGE OF VENUE RECEIVED AND FILED BY DEFENDANT TORRES CREDIT SERVICES
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
